nodes.speaker: Alien3
lines: Everyone comes about the drawer, eventually. Eight tapes, eight fallers.
You're the first who ever came BACK for one.

responses.buttonText: Then trade it back to me.

nodes.speaker: Alien3
lines: I'll trade. I traded fair for it, I'll trade fair back.
Bring me one rare of every fish that swims — or stand right there and play me something true on that guitar.

nodes.speaker: Alien3
lines: (He closes his eyes for the whole of it. When it ends, he doesn't open them right away.)
That's the one the first faller hummed. You've got the wrong version.
Good. The wrong version is ours.

nodes.speaker: Alien3
lines: (He opens the drawer without looking at it, the way you reach for something whose place you know by heart.)
Careful with side B. Six pressed hard when he wrote.

nodes.speaker: Alien3
lines: I knew all of them, friend.
I keep the drawer so that somebody does.
